steps.title: Need evidence of regrowth
steps.content: The sentence says natural forest regrowth occurred by the mid-1980s. The graph evidence must therefore show forest cover increasing after the period of decline, not just compare two classes in one year.

steps.title: Prefer change over comparison
steps.content: Choice A and choice D are single-year comparisons, so they do not show regrowth over time. Choice C describes the earlier decrease from 1960 to 1979. An increase for all classes from 1979 to 2000 directly supports forest regrowth. The answer is B.
